item.title: Plug-and-Play AI Inspection System Simplifies Industrial Quality Control
item.description: A new plug-and-play AI inspection system was released to simplify and automate industrial quality control for manufacturing.

item.title: KITOV.ai Redefines Robotic Inspection with AI-Driven 360° Vision Metrology
item.description: KITOV.ai announced the integration of CMM-Manager metrology software as the geometric dimensioning engine for its Core+ robotic inspection platform.

item.title: Geomagic Control X 2026.1 Advances Scan-Based Inspection and Metrology Automation
item.description: Hexagon's Manufacturing Intelligence released Geomagic Control X 2026.1, a 3D metrology software to capture, analyze, and validate scan-based inspection data.

item.title: Nikon Launches One Click Automated Microscope
item.description: Nikon launched ECLIPSE LV100AMS, a new automated microscope combining inspection with AI-powered image analysis for industrial quality control.

item.title: QCFlex Delivers Automated AI Acoustic Defect Testing
item.description: Signalysis launches the QCFlex inspection system, automating AI acoustic defect detection on factory floors to replace manual testing.

item.title: Bitsensing Launches 4D Imaging Radar for Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: Bitsensing launches AIR4D, a 4D imaging radar designed to integrate with camera systems for improved large-scale autonomous vehicle deployment.

item.title: 3D Automated Optical Inspection Machine Resolution Increased Four Fold - Metrology and Quality News
item.description: The resolution of 3D automated optical inspection machines has increased four-fold, enabling better quality control.
